SimpleType.name: Modelica.Fluid.Types.Dynamics
SimpleType.description: Enumeration to define definition of balance equations

Item.name: DynamicFreeInitial
Item.description: DynamicFreeInitial -- Dynamic balance, Initial guess value

Item.name: FixedInitial
Item.description: FixedInitial -- Dynamic balance, Initial value fixed

Item.name: SteadyStateInitial
Item.description: SteadyStateInitial -- Dynamic balance, Steady state initial with guess value

Item.name: SteadyState
Item.description: SteadyState -- Steady state balance, Initial guess value

Item.name: never
Item.description: Do not use as state at all.

Item.name: avoid
Item.description: Use as state, if it cannot be avoided (but only if variable appears differentiated and no other potential state with attribute default, prefer, or always can be selected).

Item.name: default
Item.description: Use as state if appropriate, but only if variable appears differentiated.

Item.name: prefer
Item.description: Prefer it as state over those having the default value (also variables can be selected, which do not appear differentiated).

Item.name: always
Item.description: Do use it as a state.

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Utilities.Types.Compare
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining comparison of two strings

Item.name: Less
Item.description: String 1 is lexicographically less than string 2

Item.name: Equal
Item.description: String 1 is identical to string 2

Item.name: Greater
Item.description: String 1 is lexicographically greater than string 2

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Fluid.Types.PortFlowDirection
SimpleType.description: Enumeration to define whether flow reversal is allowed

Item.name: Entering
Item.description: Fluid flow is only entering

Item.name: Leaving
Item.description: Fluid flow is only leaving

Item.name: Bidirectional
Item.description: No restrictions on fluid flow (flow reversal possible)

Item.name: Constant
Item.description: Use parameter to set stage

Item.name: Stages
Item.description: Use integer input to select stage

Item.name: Continuous
Item.description: Use continuous, real input

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.Init
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining initialization of a block

Item.name: NoInit
Item.description: No initialization (start values are used as guess values with fixed=false)

Item.name: SteadyState
Item.description: Steady state initialization (derivatives of states are zero)

Item.name: InitialState
Item.description: Initialization with initial states

Item.name: InitialOutput
Item.description: Initialization with initial outputs (and steady state of the states if possible)

SimpleType.name: Buildings.Fluid.Movers.BaseClasses.Types.PrescribedVariable
SimpleType.description: Enumeration to choose what variable is prescribed

Item.name: Speed
Item.description: Speed is prescribed

Item.name: FlowRate
Item.description: Flow rate is prescribed

Item.name: PressureDifference
Item.description: Pressure difference is prescribed

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.Smoothness
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining the smoothness of table interpolation

Item.name: LinearSegments
Item.description: Table points are linearly interpolated

Item.name: ContinuousDerivative
Item.description: Table points are interpolated (by Akima splines) such that the first derivative is continuous

Item.name: ConstantSegments
Item.description: Table points are not interpolated, but the value from the previous abscissa point is returned

Item.name: MonotoneContinuousDerivative1
Item.description: Table points are interpolated (by Fritsch-Butland splines) such that the monotonicity is preserved and the first derivative is continuous

Item.name: MonotoneContinuousDerivative2
Item.description: Table points are interpolated (by Steffen splines) such that the monotonicity is preserved and the first derivative is continuous

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.Extrapolation
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining the extrapolation of table interpolation

Item.name: HoldLastPoint
Item.description: Hold the first/last table point outside of the table scope

Item.name: LastTwoPoints
Item.description: Extrapolate by using the derivative at the first/last table points outside of the table scope

Item.name: Periodic
Item.description: Repeat the table scope periodically

Item.name: NoExtrapolation
Item.description: Extrapolation triggers an error

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.TimeEvents
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining the time event handling of time table interpolation

Item.name: Always
Item.description: Always generate time events at interval boundaries

Item.name: AtDiscontinuities
Item.description: Generate time events at discontinuities (defined by duplicated sample points)

Item.name: NoTimeEvents
Item.description: No time events at interval boundaries

Item.name: File
Item.description: Use data from file

Item.name: Parameter
Item.description: Use parameter

Item.name: Input
Item.description: Use input connector

SimpleType.name: Buildings.BoundaryConditions.Types.RadiationDataSource
SimpleType.description: Enumeration to define solar radiation data source

Item.name: File
Item.description: Use data from file

Item.name: Input_HGloHor_HDifHor
Item.description: Global horizontal and diffuse horizontal radiation from connector

Item.name: Input_HDirNor_HDifHor
Item.description: Direct normal and diffuse horizontal radiation from connector

Item.name: Input_HDirNor_HGloHor
Item.description: Direct normal and global horizontal radiation from connector

SimpleType.name: Buildings.BoundaryConditions.Types.SkyTemperatureCalculation
SimpleType.description: Enumeration for computation of sky temperature

Item.name: HorizontalRadiation
Item.description: Use horizontal irradiation

Item.name: TemperaturesAndSkyCover
Item.description: Use dry-bulb and dew-point temperatures and sky cover

SimpleType.name: Buildings.Fluid.Types.CvTypes
SimpleType.description: Enumeration to define the choice of valve flow coefficient

Item.name: OpPoint
Item.description: flow coefficient defined by m_flow_nominal/sqrt(dp_nominal)

Item.name: Kv
Item.description: Kv (metric) flow coefficient

Item.name: Cv
Item.description: Cv (US) flow coefficient

Item.name: Av
Item.description: Av (metric) flow coefficient

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.LimiterHomotopy
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining use of homotopy in limiter components

Item.name: NoHomotopy
Item.description: Homotopy is not used

Item.name: Linear
Item.description: Simplified model without limits

Item.name: UpperLimit
Item.description: Simplified model fixed at upper limit

Item.name: LowerLimit
Item.description: Simplified model fixed at lower limit

ScalarVariable.name: Q_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal heat flow rate, positive for heating, negative for cooling

ScalarVariable.name: R_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop per meter at nominal flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: TSetCooLea
ScalarVariable.description: Set point for leaving fluid temperature cold supply

ScalarVariable.name: TSetHeaLea
ScalarVariable.description: Set point for leaving fluid temperature warm supply

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.QWat_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat exchanged with water reservoir (positive if added to reservoir)

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.TApp
ScalarVariable.description: Approach temperature difference

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.TSetCoo
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature set point for cooling

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.TSetHea
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature set point for heating

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.TSouCoo
ScalarVariable.description: Source temperature to reject heat, such as outdoor wet bulb, outdoor drybulb, or else TSouWat

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.TSouHea
ScalarVariable.description: Source temperature to add heat the loop water (such as outdoor drybulb temperature)

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.TSouWat
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of ocean, lake or river

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.allowFlowReversal1
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal for medium 1

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.allowFlowReversal2
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal for medium 2

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.deltaM
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal flow rate where flow transitions to laminar

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.disableHeatExchanger
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to disable the heat exchanger

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.dp1
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a1 and port_b1

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.dp2
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a2 and port_b2

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.dpHex_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop of heat exchanger pipe and other resistances in the heat exchanger flow leg that are in series with the valve

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.dpValve_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal pressure drop of fully open valve

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.from_dp
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.linearizeFlowResistance
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.m1_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a1 to port_b1 (m1_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.m1_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.m1_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.m2_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a2 to port_b2 (m2_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.m2_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.m2_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.port_a1.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.port_a1.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.port_a1.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.dpValve_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal pressure drop of fully open valve, used if CvData=Buildings.Fluid.Types.CvTypes.OpPoint

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.k
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of valve and pipe in series, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.kFixed
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of fixed resistance that may be in series with valve, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.kVal
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of valve, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.l
ScalarVariable.description: Valve leakage, l=Kv(y=0)/Kv(y=1)

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.linearized
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a to port_b (m_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.m_flow_turbulent
ScalarVariable.description: Turbulent flow if |m_flow| >= m_flow_turbulent

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.order
ScalarVariable.description: Order of filter

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.phi
ScalarVariable.description: Ratio actual to nominal mass flow rate of valve, phi=Kv(y)/Kv(y=1)

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.port_a.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.description: Inlet density for which valve coefficients are defined

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.riseTime
ScalarVariable.description: Rise time of the filter (time to reach 99.6 % of an opening step)

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.show_T
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if actual temperature at port is computed

ScalarVariable.name: bayWatHex.valCoo.res1.use_inputFilter

ScalarVariable.name: ret.chi.con.vol.prescribedHeatFlowRate

ScalarVariable.name: ret.chi.con.vol.simplify_mWat_flow

ScalarVariable.description: Type of independent mass fraction balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.description: Condenser leaving water temperature

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.massDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of mass balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.nPorts
ScalarVariable.description: Number of ports

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.p
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure of the fluid

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.p_start
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of pressure

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.ports[1].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.ports[1].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.ports[1].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.ports[2].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.ports[2].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.ports[2].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.ports[3].h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.ports[3].m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.ports[3].p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.prescribedHeatFlowRate
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true if the model has a prescribed heat flow at its heatPort. If the heat flow rate at the heatPort is only based on temperature difference, then set to false

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.simplify_mWat_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to cause port_a.m_flow + port_b.m_flow = 0 even if mWat_flow is non-zero

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.substanceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of independent mass fraction balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.tau
ScalarVariable.description: Time constant at nominal flow

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.traceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of trace substance balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: splSup.vol.use_C_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to enable input connector for trace substance

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.columns[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Columns of table to be interpolated

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.extrapolation
ScalarVariable.description: Extrapolation of data outside the definition range

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.fileName
ScalarVariable.description: File where matrix is stored

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.nout
ScalarVariable.description: Number of outputs

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.offset[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Offsets of output signals

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.shiftTime
ScalarVariable.description: Shift time of first table column

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.smoothness
ScalarVariable.description: Smoothness of table interpolation

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.startTime
ScalarVariable.description: Output = offset for time < startTime

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.t_max
ScalarVariable.description: Maximum abscissa value defined in table

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.t_maxScaled
ScalarVariable.description: Maximum (scaled) abscissa value defined in table

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.t_min
ScalarVariable.description: Minimum abscissa value defined in table

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.t_minScaled
ScalarVariable.description: Minimum (scaled) abscissa value defined in table

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.tableName
ScalarVariable.description: Table name on file or in function usertab (see docu)

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.tableOnFile
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if table is defined on file or in function usertab

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.timeEvents
ScalarVariable.description: Time event handling of table interpolation

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.timeScale
ScalarVariable.description: Time scale of first table column

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.verboseExtrapolation
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if warning messages are to be printed if time is outside the table definition range

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.verboseRead
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if info message that file is loading is to be printed

ScalarVariable.name: watTem.y[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Connector of Real output signals
